text: Increased productivity, ability to stay awake during the day. Dry lips & mouth. Teeth grinding. Tough time sleeping. Highly addictive. This was used in conjunction with Lexapro for depression. I started taking it to keep myself awake (drowsiness as a side effect of the LExapro). However I quickly lost about 10 lbs and couldn't stop moving around. Eventually my thinking became jumbled (I don't have ADD). I was constantly thinking in circles.
